project_type: Next.js 16 app with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, React 19
test_framework: No test framework configured - no test files exist
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to install dependencies. 2. Run npm run build to verify the app builds without errors. 3. Run npm run lint to check for linting issues.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode - full access to npm registry. No Docker required. AGENTS.md mentions checking node_modules/next/dist/docs/ for Next.js API changes but the directory does not exist in this install.
contribution_requirements: Use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes, semantic HTML for all layout sections (per steering file). Follow existing code patterns and conventions.
key_patterns: Client components use 'use client' directive. Forms use useActionState hook with server actions from lib/auth-actions.ts. Styling uses Tailwind CSS with dark mode support (dark: prefix). Input styling pattern: 'mt-1 block w-full rounded-lg border border-zinc-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-zinc-900 shadow-sm placeholder:text-zinc-400 focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 dark:border-zinc-700 dark:bg-zinc-800 dark:text-zinc-100 dark:placeholder:text-zinc-500 dark:focus:border-blue-400'
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js app directory with pages and components. app/components/ - shared React components. app/register/ - registration page. lib/ - utility modules (auth, db, types, timezone, actions). No tests directory exists.
